'''Mois Parcon'''<ref name="crc" /> was an [[Color/Legends|orange]]-skinned<ref name="II" /> [[Kajain'sa'Nikto/Legends|Kajain'sa'Nikto]] who frequented the [[Outlander Club/Legends|Outlander Club]],<ref name="CSWE" /> a [[Nightclub/Legends|nightclub]] and [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] hall in the [[Uscru Entertainment District/Legends|Uscru Entertainment District]] of<ref name="CSWE2">{{CSWECite|II|431|Outlander Club}}</ref> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="FF96">{{FactFile|96|OUT 1-2|Outlander Nightclub Patrons}}</ref> [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="CSWE2" /> During a [[Local day/Legends|night]]<ref name="II" /> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of {{Film|II}} to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].</ref> the [[Nikto/Legends|Nikto]] exited the club<ref name="aotc">{{Film|II}}</ref> accompanied by a [[Pacithhip/Legends|Pacithhip]] and the [[Human/Legends|Human]]<ref name="II" /> [[Palee Ruda]].<ref name="crc" /> Just as the group exited, [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Zam Wesell/Legends|Zam Wesell]] ran into the club away from the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] after her [[Plot to assassinate Senator Amidala/Legends|assassination attempt]] on [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]].<ref name="II" />

==Behind the scenes==
Mois Parcon first appeared in the [[2002]] [[prequel trilogy]] film [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']].<ref name="II" /> The character was first named in an image in the  [[StarWars.com]] web article "[[Cantina Roll-Call: Shedding Light on Some Alien Aliases]]," published on [[May 2]], [[2003]].<ref name="crc">{{SWArchive|url=episode-iv/bts/article/f20030502/index.html|text=Cantina Roll-Call: Shedding Light on Some Alien Aliases|int=Cantina Roll-Call: Shedding Light on Some Alien Aliases}}</ref> In the [[2008]] reference book ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Stephen J. Sansweet]], the character's name is misspelled as "Mais Pardon."<ref name="CSWE" />
